title: Zesty Instance
description: A Zesty.io instance represents an individual content management site or application. Each instance is assigned a unique ZUID (Zesty Universal Identifier) upon creation and can be interacted with over HTTPS.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the instance.

ecoZUID.description: The ecosystem ZUID this instance belongs to.

domain.description: The primary domain for the instance.

blueprint.description: The blueprint used to create the instance.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the instance was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the instance was last updated.
